User.title: User
User.description: A user of the application, either a technician or a customer.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

address.description: The service address of the customer.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the customer.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

address.description: The service address of the customer.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the customer.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: A service job for a customer.

id.description: The unique ID of the job.

scheduledAt.description: When the job is scheduled for.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A chat message between a customer and a technician.

id.description: The unique ID of the message.

senderId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

senderName.description: The name of the user who sent the message.

Availability.title: Availability
Availability.description: The working hours for a technician on a specific day.

startTime.description: The start time of the shift (e.g., '09:00').

endTime.description: The end time of the shift (e.g., '17:00').

isActive.description: Whether the technician is available on this day.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: An in-app notification for a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the notification.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

jobId.description: The ID of the job related to this notification.

/users/{userId}.description: The user document containing core profile information.

/jobs/{jobId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Chat messages for a specific job.

/users/{userId}/availability/{dayId}.description: The technician's availability for a specific day.

/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificat.description: In-app notifications for a specific user.
